general_news.summary: Efforts are on to set up new hospitals in Kozhikode, Palakkad, Thrissur, Ernakulam, and Alappuzha, say Muslim Educational Society functionaries

general_news.title: Seven infants received at ‘Ammathottil’ in Kozhikode in nine months
general_news.summary: The district secretary of the Kerala State Council for Child Welfare and the district manager of Sisu Vikas Bhavan receive a mobile app alert as soon as a child is found in the cradle, following which hospital staff inspect the child’s health indicators before adoption procedures are initiated
